result.summary: The page is largely functional but shows several visual truncation problems: navigation labels and game tiles are clipped at the right edge, and game cards at the bottom are cut off mid-render. There are also minor consistency and contrast concerns.

issues.description: The 'Hot Games' navigation tab label is truncated to 'Hot Gar' at the right edge of the category navigation bar, with no clear visual affordance (like a fade or arrow) indicating more tabs exist.
issues.suggestion: Add a scroll indicator (gradient fade or chevron) to the horizontal nav, or adjust tab sizing so labels are not cut mid-word at the viewport edge.

issues.description: Game thumbnails in the third column of every carousel row ('Magnificent Pho...', 'Munch Mil...', 'Hyperc...', 'Dark Water...') are clipped at the right viewport edge, cutting off titles and imagery.
issues.suggestion: If this is an intentional carousel peek, ensure a consistent partial-tile width and add a subtle fade or scroll arrow; otherwise adjust the grid so full tiles fit the viewport.

issues.description: The bottom row of game cards ('Who Wants To Be A Millionaire', 'Rakin' Bacon', 'Dark Waters') is abruptly cut off by the fixed bottom navigation bar, hiding parts of the artwork and any info/jackpot overlays.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the scrollable content area so cards are not obscured by the fixed bottom nav.

issues.description: The left carousel arrow on the promotional banner has very low contrast against the yellow background, making it hard to see compared to the right arrow.
issues.suggestion: Increase the contrast or add a semi-transparent background behind the carousel arrows for consistent visibility.

issues.description: The 'BONUS CODE WELCOME' text on the banner is small blue text on a yellow/dark background and may fall below contrast and legibility guidelines on mobile.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size and verify color contrast meets WCAG AA (4.5:1) for the bonus code text.

issues.description: Jackpot amount overlays appear inconsistently — some tiles show amounts ($6,268.60, $13,015.68) while other jackpot-eligible tiles show only an 'i' icon, creating uneven card layouts.
issues.suggestion: Standardize the tile overlay layout so jackpot badges and info icons occupy consistent positions across all game cards.
